name: update_clock_routing
short_description: Update clock routing on global clocks if they are modified after placement
full_help:
update_clock_routing

Description: 
Update clock routing on global clocks if they are modified after placement

Syntax: 
update_clock_routing  [-pin <args>] [-net <args>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-pin]      A single pin (pin should be already unrouted)
  [-net]      A single net (net should be already unrouted)
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Tools, Tcl

arguments.description: A single pin (pin should be already unrouted)
A single net (net should be already unrouted)
Suspend message limits during command execution
